form.label: Search And Drilldown
form.description: Scoped raw-search pivots for the seeded DefenseClaw and OpenClaw investigation model.

html.p: This page is the raw search target for the workbench and command center. Scope the page by run or session, then use the pivot field to narrow down to all, policy, runtime, diagnostics, usage, trace, or a specific event_type:... passed in from the workbench timeline.

search.query: `dcso_investigation_events($run_id$,$session_id$)` | where "$pivot$"="all" OR ("$pivot$"="policy" AND event_domain="policy") OR ("$pivot$"="runtime" AND event_domain="runtime") OR ("$pivot$"="diagnostics" AND event_domain="operations") OR ("$pivot$"="usage" AND event_domain="usage") OR ("$pivot$"="trace" AND event_domain="trace") OR (match("$pivot$", "^event_type:") AND event_type=replace("$pivot$", "^event_type:", "")) | table timestamp event_domain event_type component action status severity actor target message request_id trace_id | sort - timestamp | head 50

`dcso_policy_events` | where ("$run_id$"="*" OR run_id="$run_id$") AND ("$session_id$"="*" OR session_id="$session_id$") AND ("$pivot$"="all" OR "$pivot$"="policy" OR "$pivot$"="event_type:policy.decision") | table timestamp run_id session_id action status severity actor target policy_id disposition reason message details | sort - timestamp | head 25

`dcso_runtime_events` | where ("$run_id$"="*" OR run_id="$run_id$") AND ("$session_id$"="*" OR session_id="$session_id$") AND ("$pivot$"="all" OR "$pivot$"="runtime" OR (match("$pivot$", "^event_type:") AND event_type=replace("$pivot$", "^event_type:", ""))) | table timestamp run_id session_id event_type component action status severity target error_code request_id trace_id message details | sort - timestamp | head 25

`dcso_diagnostics_events` | where ("$run_id$"="*" OR run_id="$run_id$") AND ("$session_id$"="*" OR session_id="$session_id$") AND ("$pivot$"="all" OR "$pivot$"="diagnostics" OR (match("$pivot$", "^event_type:") AND event_type=replace("$pivot$", "^event_type:", ""))) | table timestamp run_id session_id event_type component action status severity target queue_name retry_count health_state wait_ms queue_depth message details | sort - timestamp | head 25

`dcso_usage_events` | where ("$run_id$"="*" OR run_id="$run_id$") AND ("$session_id$"="*" OR session_id="$session_id$") AND ("$pivot$"="all" OR "$pivot$"="usage" OR (match("$pivot$", "^event_type:") AND event_type=replace("$pivot$", "^event_type:", ""))) | table timestamp run_id session_id event_type provider model cost token_count duration_ms metric_name metric_value status severity message | sort - timestamp | head 25

`dcso_trace_events` | where ("$run_id$"="*" OR run_id="$run_id$") AND ("$session_id$"="*" OR session_id="$session_id$") AND ("$pivot$"="all" OR "$pivot$"="trace" OR (match("$pivot$", "^event_type:") AND event_type=replace("$pivot$", "^event_type:", ""))) | table timestamp run_id session_id trace_id span_id parent_span_id span_name duration_ms status component message | sort - timestamp | head 25

| makeresults count=6 | streamstats count as row | eval pivot_name=case(row=1, "Workbench summary", row=2, "Policy summary", row=3, "Correlated timeline", row=4, "Runtime evidence", row=5, "Diagnostics health", row=6, "Usage and trace"), spl=case(row=1, "`dcso_workbench_summary($run_id$,$session_id$,$pivot$)`", row=2, "`dcso_workbench_policy_summary($run_id$,$session_id$)`", row=3, "`dcso_workbench_timeline($run_id$,$session_id$)`", row=4, "`dcso_workbench_runtime_evidence($run_id$,$session_id$)`", row=5, "`dcso_workbench_diagnostics_health($run_id$,$session_id$)`", row=6, "`dcso_workbench_usage_evidence($run_id$,$session_id$)` and `dcso_workbench_trace_spans($run_id$,$session_id$)`") | table pivot_name spl
